title: CovertCare
description: Cover slide with hero image and primary tagline

title: The Problem
description: Three core gaps: fragmented channels, unnecessary data exposure, no disposition framework

title: Existing Approaches
description: Informal channels vs what is missing — structured intake, governance, disposition, data minimization

title: Care Relay Workflow
description: SVG diagram of the four-node care relay: Field Intermediary, CovertCare Relay, Qualified Clinician, Disposition

title: Stakeholder Roles
description: Three-column layout: Host Organization, Trained Intermediary, Qualified Clinician

title: Explicit Limits
description: Five structural boundary statements: not an emergency service, not an anonymous marketplace, no AI diagnosis, no anonymity claim, no deployment without gates

title: The Pilot Offer
description: Section divider: eight weeks, one partner, governed scope, clear stop criteria

title: Eight-Week Pilot Structure
description: Four-phase timeline: Discovery, Simulation, Supervised Operation, Evaluation

title: Partner Criteria
description: Two-column: what the host organization brings vs what CovertCare provides

title: What We Measure
description: 2x2 grid: Response Timeliness, Referral Clarity, Data Minimization, Safety Incidents

title: Safety Gates
description: Four required gates (Clinical, Legal, Security, Partner) and four stop criteria

title: Sustainability Model
description: Three pillars: institutional licensing, grant funding, open learning — no data monetization

title: Two Ways to Engage
description: Closing slide: partner inquiry path and advisory interest path, contact note
